style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Pikachu's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor; glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its seam lines like circuitry, accompanied by shimmering metallic dust particles drifting in slow motion. A cool, intense blue-white aura surrounds its body in a tight, geometric halo, casting sharp, precise shadows under a crisp, clinical moonlight. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
